scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/rbxts-transform-boost build && bun run --cwd packages/rbxts-transform-luau build && bun run --cwd packages/rbxts-transform-native build
scripts.bench:rotor: bun run build && cd bench/rotor && rotor build -p tsconfig.json --rojo default.project.json && rotor build -p tsconfig.notransform.json --rojo default.project.json
scripts.bench:roblox-ts: bun run build && cd bench/roblox-ts && bunx rbxtsc -p tsconfig.json --rojo default.project.json && bunx rbxtsc -p tsconfig.notransform.json --rojo default.project.json
scripts.bench:rbxlx:rotor: bun run bench:rotor && cd bench/rotor && rojo build default.project.json -o benchmark-rotor.rbxlx
scripts.bench:rbxlx:roblox-ts: bun run bench:roblox-ts && cd bench/roblox-ts && rojo build default.project.json -o benchmark-roblox-ts.rbxlx
scripts.sourcemap: cd bench/rotor && rojo sourcemap default.project.json -o sourcemap.json
scripts.sourcemap:watch: cd bench/rotor && rojo sourcemap default.project.json -o sourcemap.json --watch
